title: Chaggay #2292
definition:
Haggai = "festive"

 1) 10th in order of the minor prophets; first prophet to prophecy
    after the captivity
nasbUsage:

 1) 10th in order of the minor prophets; first prophet to prophecy
    after the captivity

    NASB:  festal, a Heb. prophet
